'''vangama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalattosaurid|thalattosaurid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalattosaurid|thalattosaurid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vangama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vængæmæth|vængæmæth]] || [[word:vængæmæj|vængæmæj]] || [[word:vængæmæsh|vængæmæsh]] || [[word:vængæmæ|vængæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vangangamath|vangangamath]] || [[word:vangangamaj|vangangamaj]] || [[word:vangangamash|vangangamash]] || [[word:vangangama|vangangama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vangamath|vangamath]] || [[word:vangamaj|vangamaj]] || [[word:vangamash|vangamash]] || [[word:vangama|vangama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vangafmath|vangafmath]] || [[word:vangafmaj|vangafmaj]] || [[word:vangafmash|vangafmash]] || [[word:vangafmaf|vangafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vangamatha|vangamatha]] || [[word:vangamaja|vangamaja]] || [[word:vangamasha|vangamasha]] || [[word:vangamaka|vangamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vangamath|vangamath]] || [[word:vangamaj|vangamaj]] || [[word:vangamash|vangamash]] || [[word:vangama|vangama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vangamathal|vangamathal]] || [[word:vangamajal|vangamajal]] || [[word:vangamashal|vangamashal]] || [[word:vangamakal|vangamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vangamathatha|vangamathatha]] || [[word:vangamajaja|vangamajaja]] || [[word:vangamashasha|vangamashasha]] || [[word:vangamaka|vangamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vangamathan|vangamathan]] || [[word:vangamajan|vangamajan]] || [[word:vangamashan|vangamashan]] || [[word:vangamakan|vangamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vangamathaoro|vangamathaoro]] || [[word:vangamajaoro|vangamajaoro]] || [[word:vangamashaoro|vangamashaoro]] || [[word:vangamakaoro|vangamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
